channel.title: Latte Art on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Latte Art on Barista At Home

item.title: How to Do Latte Art: Beginner's Guide to Free Pour Technique
item.description: Learn how to make latte art at home step by step. Covers the equipment you need, milk steaming technique, basic heart and tulip patterns, and practice tips for beginners.

item.title: How to Make a Flat White at Home: Recipe and Milk Technique
item.description: A flat white recipe for home baristas. Covers the exact espresso-to-milk ratio, microfoam technique, and what makes a flat white different from a latte.
